title: DL Profile Meta-Schema
description: Defines the structural requirements that any DL (Description Language) profile schema must satisfy. A profile schema is valid if it conforms to this meta-schema. SDL (Software Description Language) is the reference profile.

$id.description: Unique URI identifier for this profile schema.

title.description: Human-readable name for this primitive schema.

description.description: Description of what this primitive represents in the profile's domain.

type.description: All DL primitives must be JSON objects.

dl.description: DL binding metadata. Declares which DL concepts this schema implements and how.

profile.description: The name of the DL profile this schema belongs to.

version.description: The DL spec version this profile conforms to.

concepts.description: The DL meta-concepts this primitive implements. Each primitive implements one or more DL concepts.

layer.description: Which DL layer this primitive primarily belongs to.

perspectives.description: If this primitive implements the Perspective concept, list all declared perspectives. Required: at least one must have role 'intent' and one must have role 'implementation'.

name.description: The perspective name as it appears in the schema.

role.description: 'intent' = plain language view for domain experts. 'implementation' = technical view for engineers. 'supplementary' = additional view.

notes.description: Optional notes about how this primitive maps to DL concepts.
